creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 185225
knot-Resolver 1.3.3

Oh.. (as in oh-oh ). Thanks.
I never noticed as I use the very minimalistic version. Good you did.

So I test your patch against i386 & amd64 on 10.3, 11.0, 11.1 and already on 12.0
And it's all fine.

But while running these tests, 1.3.3 already was released.
So I adjusted against that, ran the same tests again, and again all is fine.

So if you wish to first close this PR then patch 185016 is approved.
If you wish to upgrade straight to 1.3.3 then attached patch is also.
